creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text: After taking taking the latest patch and updating the checksum the following pkg-plist problem remains: http://people.freebsd.org/~ehaupt/snippets/kato3/bigloo-3.7a.2.log - also, files seem to get installed in non-standard locations  (eg. usr/local/doc/bigloo-3.7a).
